description: Perform an RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) Customer Segmentation analysis in WPS Spreadsheet using the file at '/home/ga/Documents/rfm_analysis.xlsx'. In the 'Customer_Data' sheet, calculate 'Recency_Days' for each customer using the reference date '2011-12-10'. Generate 'R_Score', 'F_Score', and 'M_Score' columns by applying the criteria from the 'Scoring_Rules' sheet, then combine these into a 3-digit 'RFM_Score'. Assign each customer a 'Customer_Segment' based on the 'Segment_Mapping' sheet. Create a new sheet named 'Segment_Summary' that displays the 'Customer_Count' and 'Total_Revenue' for each unique segment. Save the completed analysis to '/home/ga/Documents/rfm_analysis.xlsx'.

metadata.data_source: UCI Machine Learning Repository - Online Retail Dataset (Subset)
